news.headline: Global Hydrogen Trucks Market to grow at 43.5% CAGR, hitting $62.45B by 2031 from $4.98B in 2024 due to clean fuel demand & environmental concerns.
news.summary: The global Hydrogen Trucks Market, valued at $4.98 billion in 2024, is expected to reach $62.45 billion by 2031. Major growth factors include rising investments by automakers in fuel cell technologies, with heavy-duty truck manufacturers like Toyota and Hyundai launching hydrogen-powered Class 8 trucks. The market is being driven by a push towards clean fuel vehicles to reduce carbon emissions, in line with government policies promoting zero-emission vehicles. Companies like Shell and Air Liquide are investing in hydrogen refueling stations to support the increasing adoption of hydrogen trucks. The market is poised to grow at a CAGR of 43.5%, with the development of green hydrogen production using renewable energy emerging as a key trend.

news.headline: Aquafeed market to reach $103.4B by 2031, up from $61.9B in 2022. Shift towards sustainable ingredients noted. Automation to enhance production efficiency and sustainability. Pellets & fish species to drive demand. North America leading consumer. Key players adopting expansion strategies.
news.summary: The global aquafeed market was valued at US$61.9 billion in 2022 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.9% between 2023 and 2031, reaching US$103.4 billion. Traditional marine proteins in aquafeed may be replaced with sustainable and alternative ingredients such as plant-based proteins, insect meal, and single-cell proteins. Aquafeed is being researched to improve nutritional content and enhance growth and health of farmed species, with precision feeding based on life stages. Automation and data analytics advancements may lead to more efficient and sustainable aquafeed production. The pellets segment is expected to drive demand, fish species to drive aquafeed demand, and health segment to create a market for aquafeed. North America is the largest consumer of aquafeed due to aquaculture and seafood production. Key players in the market include Cargill Inc., Koninklijke DSM N.V., BENEO GmbH, Sonac B.V., and others, who employ various expansion strategies to introduce new nutritious feeds for fish and aquatic animals.

news.headline: SurgiBox, Inc. receives patent in the Philippines, enhancing its global presence. Atif Rakin, CTO mentioned.
news.summary: SurgiBox, Inc., based in Cambridge, MA, has recently been granted a patent by the Intellectual Property Office of the Philippines (IPOPHL). This certificate of grant marks a significant achievement for the company in the field of portable surgical solutions. Atif Rakin, the Chief Technology Officer at SurgiBox, expressed pride in this accomplishment. The exact date of the patent issuance was October 16, 2024.

news.headline: Italy considering increasing Bitcoin capital gains tax to 42% from 26%, removing 750 million euro threshold for Digital Services Tax.
news.summary: Italy is considering increasing the withholding tax on Bitcoin capital gains to 42% and eliminating the previous 750 million euro minimum revenue threshold for the Digital Services Tax.

news.headline: Subway unveils spiciest sandwiches with new Ghost Pepper Bread, offering ghosters a chance to rekindle old flame.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, Subway has released the spiciest sandwiches in the brand's history. To mark this occasion, the fast-food chain is inviting customers to experience these fiery new offerings by giving them an exclusive opportunity for redemption. At an event in Miami on October 16, 2024, Subway announced the launch of these unprecedented menu items, which promise to tantalize taste buds like never before. This promotion is set to reignite the passion for loyal customers with a chance to reconnect with an old favorite flavor.

news.headline: SOLTECH receives national certification as Women's Business Enterprise by GWBC. Leading provider of software development and IT staffing.
news.summary: Atlanta-based SOLTECH, a prominent company specializing in custom software development, IT staffing, and technology consulting services, has recently achieved national recognition as a Women's Business Enterprise certified by the Greater Women's Business Council (GWBC). This certification underscores their commitment to promoting and supporting women in business. The Greater Women's Business Council (GWBC) is a regional organization dedicated to empowering women-owned businesses. The certification serves as a testament to SOLTECH's dedication to diversity and inclusivity in the business world. The announcement was made on October 16, 2024, marking a significant milestone for SOLTECH.

news.headline: National Grid Renewables celebrates Ohio portfolio expansion with 120 MW Ross County and 47.5 MW Fayette solar projects. Operation by late 2024.
news.summary: In late 2024, the Ross County Solar Project, generating 120 MW, along with the Fayette Solar Project, producing 47.5 MW, are set to commence operations. A recent event in Minneapolis, hosted by National Grid Renewables, marked the construction milestones for these two projects in Ohio.

news.headline: European Wax Center rises 11 spots in Franchise Times' Top 400 Ranking, continuing as out-of-home waxing leader. Largest and fastest-growing in US. (Spaces used: 150)
news.summary: A franchise based in Plano, Texas, known as European Wax Center, Inc. (NASDAQ: EWCZ), has seen a significant rise in the annual franchise rankings, climbing 11 positions. Specializing in out-of-home waxing services, the company holds the top spot in its category in the United States. This growth marks European Wax Center as a leading force in the industry, being the largest and quickest expanding franchisor and operator within the sector.

news.headline: Orszag's tips on advising the President.
Bitdeer (Nasdaq: BTDR) tests its energy-efficient SEAL02 Bitcoin mining chip, achieving 13.5J/ETH efficiency with TSMC partnership.
news.summary: There are optimistic predictions for the Bitcoin price, which could lead to increased demand for BTC miners. Following the Bitcoin halving six months ago, experts anticipate significant upside potential for the BTC price in the short and long term. Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ:BTDR) is preparing to introduce its latest, more energy-efficient technology to support the Bitcoin mining community. The company recently shared the successful testing of SEAL02, the newest in its lineup of Bitcoin mining chips. Developed in collaboration with TSMC, the initial tests of SEAL02 showcased an efficiency of 13.5J/ETH in ultra power-saving mode, following the receipt of initial tape-out wafers from TSMC in September. More updates and releases are expected from Bitdeer as they continue to enhance their mining technology.

news.headline: Harmony Biosciences (Nasdaq: HRMY) will report Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 29, 2024, before the U.S. markets open.
news.summary: In Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, on October 16, 2024, Harmony Biosciences Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: HRMY) revealed their plans to release their financial statistics for the third quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, October 29, 2024, before the commencement of the U.S. financial markets. Harmony is set to conduct a conference call to discuss these results...

news.headline: ValidaTek wins $73M contract with US State Dept for Consular Affairs Queue Management project.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, ValidaTek secured a five-year contract on September 19, 2024, to extend its collaboration with the US Department of State for the Consular Affairs Queue Management (CAQM) program. This contract reaffirms ValidaTek’s commitment to supporting the Department and involves significant work over the next five years.

news.headline: Blue Ridge Partners hires John Drosos as MD, enhancing leadership team in Chicago. Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: A reputable global management consultancy based in Chicago recently welcomed a skilled and seasoned Managing Director, John Drosos, to its expanding leadership roster on October 16, 2024. Blue Ridge Partners proudly introduced Drosos, who brings extensive expertise and talent to the team.

news.headline: SPLICE Software integrates with Insuresoft's Diamond core system in release 539.010, adding FNOL capabilities.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Chicago, SPLICE Software, a prominent player in customer engagement, revealed their latest collaboration with Insuresoft's Diamond core system. This new integration is included in the Diamond 539.010 base release, which became accessible starting from October 1, 2024. The integration focuses on enhancing FNOL (First Notice of Loss) processes, aiming to streamline and improve customer experience.

news.headline: Glia launches AI-powered call center platform for insurance industry on Oct. 16, 2024. Designed to supercharge performance.
news.summary: Glia, a prominent player in customer interaction technology, has introduced the Glia Call Center solution tailored for insurance firms in a move to streamline processes and enhance performance. The turnkey platform is designed to automate workflows and boost efficiency in customer service representatives and managers. This innovative offering, unveiled in New York on October 16, 2024, is poised to revolutionize operations by providing a comprehensive solution for insurance companies.

news.headline: Lazard CEO Orszag discusses major geopolitical risks in recent interview.
Hisense releases 110-inch ULED X Mini LED TV globally for $20,000 after CES debut earlier this year.
news.summary: Hisense, a prominent global brand in consumer electronics and home appliances, unveiled the availability of its 110-inch ULED X Mini LED TV worldwide from Qingdao, China on October 16, 2024. Priced at US$20,000, this television was originally introduced at CES earlier this year, where it garnered significant attention and acclaim as a cutting-edge product in the industry.

news.headline: Slate Office REIT (TSX: SOT.UN) to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 8. Owner of workplace real estate assets in North America.
news.summary: Toronto-based Slate Office REIT (TSX: SOT.UN) has disclosed plans to unveil its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 prior to market opening on Friday, November 8, 2024. The REIT specializes in owning and managing top-notch office spaces worldwide. Slate Office REIT holds stakes in and manages a collection of prime real estate assets strategically positioned in North America.

news.headline: Ulta Beauty announces $3B share buyback plan and aims to launch 200 stores in 3 years.
Suffolk ranks among top 10 green contractors with $3.36B green design revenue, 61% of total revenue, on 2024 ENR list.
news.summary: In Boston, Suffolk, a leading real estate and construction firm, has been recognized as one of the top 10 green contractors in the US according to Engineering News-Record (ENR) magazine's 2024 report on the "Top 100 Green Building Contractors." Suffolk climbed to eighth place this year, generating over $3.36 billion in green design revenue in 2023, which accounts for 61% of its total revenue. The ENR Top 100 Green Building Contractors list acknowledges companies for their commitment to sustainable building practices and environmental responsibility.

news.headline: Service Properties Trust (SVC) reduces cash distribution from $0.20 to $0.01 per share, saving $127 million annually. Plans to sell 114 hotels managed by Sonesta International.
news.summary: A company based in Newton, Mass., Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) has decided to decrease its regular quarterly cash distribution on common shares from $0.20 per share ($0.80 annually) to $0.01 per share ($0.04 annually). This reduction will lead to yearly savings of $127 million. Additionally, SVC intends to sell 114 focused service hotels managed by Sonesta International Hotels Corporation.

news.headline: Diversified Healthcare Trust declares $0.01 quarterly dividend per common share ($0.04 yearly), payable to shareholders on Nov 14, 2024.
news.summary: Diversified Healthcare Trust (Nasdaq: DHC) of Newton, Mass. revealed a quarterly cash distribution of $0.01 per common share ($0.04 yearly) today. This distribution is set for DHC’s common shareholders of record by October 28, 2024, with the payout occurring around November 14, 2024. DHC is a real estate investment trust specializing in premium healthcare properties.

news.headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) declares $0.35 per share ($1.40 yearly) dividend for common shareholders.
news.summary: Seven Hills Realty Trust, a real estate finance company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol SEVN, revealed a standard cash payout on its common shares of $0.35 per share, totaling $1.40 per share annually. Shareholders of record as of October 28, 2024, will receive this distribution, expected to be distributed around November 14, 2024. Seven Hills Realty Trust concentrates on originating and investing in real estate funds.

news.headline: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust declares $0.01 per common share ($0.04 annually) dividend; paid to shareholders on Nov 14, 2024.
news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) revealed that they will be issuing a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.01 per common share, equating to $0.04 annually per share. This payout is scheduled for distribution to common shareholders recorded as of October 28, 2024, with the actual distribution set to take place around November 14, 2024. Industrial Logistics Properties Trust, a real estate investment trust specializing in the ownership and leasing of top-quality properties, manages this dividend distribution.

news.headline: Office Properties Income Trust (Nasdaq: OPI) declares $0.01 quarterly dividend ($0.04 per year) per common share.
news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Office Properties Income Trust (Nasdaq: OPI) revealed a $0.01 quarterly cash distribution per common share ($0.04 annually). Shareholders of record by October 28, 2024, will receive this payment around November 14, 2024. OPI is a national REIT specializing in office properties for top credit tenants.

news.headline: RMR Group (Nasdaq: RMR) declares $0.45 per share quarterly dividend ($1.80 per year), paid Nov. 14 to shareholders.
news.summary: In Newton, Mass., The RMR Group Inc. (Nasdaq: RMR) has declared a standard quarterly cash distribution for its Class A Common Stock and Class B-1 Common Stock at $0.45 per share ($1.80 per share annually). Shareholders of record as of October 28, 2024, will receive this distribution around November 14, 2024. The RMR Group is a prominent U.S. alternative asset management firm known for specializing in this field.

news.headline: Belgard to showcase products and solutions at Hardscape North America on Oct 16-18, 2024, in Kentucky. Partnering with Oldcastle APG. #OutdoorLiving.
news.summary: Belgard®, a top supplier of outdoor living products for patios and more, is set to showcase its newest product developments and offerings at Hardscape North America from October 16 – 18, 2024, in Louisville, Kentucky. Alongside Belgard, its parent company Oldcastle APG will exhibit a comprehensive range of outdoor living solutions designed to assist contractors in building stunning outdoor areas and empowering homeowners to enhance their living spaces.

news.headline: IncNow has launched CTAboi to assist LLCs with Beneficial Ownership Reporting. Millions of BOI reports have been filed in 2024.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware, John L. Williams, president of the 50-year-old IncNow, announced the launch of their wholly-owned subsidiary, CTAboi.com, emphasizing that entrepreneurs, LLC, and small business owners must file Beneficial Ownership Information reports immediately. Williams highlighted that millions of BOI reports were submitted in 2024. He noted that approximately 80% of entrepreneurs still need to complete this requirement.

news.headline: SmartRent will announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 6. Conference call will be hosted. $SMRT.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, SmartRent is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter of the fiscal year 2024. The company will also conduct a conference call on Wednesday, November 6.

news.headline: Morgan Stanley Q3 earnings beat expectations with adjusted EPS of $1.88, net earnings up 33% to $3.2 billion, and sales of $15.38 billion, exceeding consensus. Total client assets surpass $7.5 trillion with strong results across business segments.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) announced impressive financial results for the third quarter. The adjusted earnings per share stood at $1.88, a significant increase from $1.38 in the previous year, surpassing market expectations set at $1.58. The firm's net earnings soared by nearly 33% to reach $3.2 billion. Notably, third-quarter sales amounted to $15.38 billion, marking a 15.9% surge from the previous year and beating the projected $14.41 billion. Ted Pick, the CEO, highlighted the strength of the Integrated Firm, citing robust performance across various business segments. He mentioned a positive environment globally, especially in the Institutional Securities division where they saw growth in market activities and underwriting services. The total client assets now exceed $7.5 trillion. These results are indicative of a successful quarter for Morgan Stanley.

news.headline: Iran suffers oil leak near vital Kharg Island terminal - Tasnim.
Harris & Trump unveil economic plans, focusing on boosting the economy with tariffs and aiding Black entrepreneurs.
news.summary: The candidates elaborated on their plans to strengthen the economy, offering solutions that included implementing tariffs and increasing support for Black entrepreneurs. Key emphasis was placed on providing specific strategies to boost economic growth.

news.headline: Blueprint Medicines will report Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 30, 2024, through a live conference call.
news.summary: Blueprint Medicines Corporation, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BPMC, disclosed its plan to conduct a live conference call and webcast on October 30, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. ET. The purpose of this event is to unveil the financial results for the third quarter of 2024 and offer insights into the company's corporate performance. This announcement was made from Cambridge, Massachusetts.

news.headline: Indico Data launches Agentic AI solution for commercial insurance, accelerates time to quote for global carriers.
news.summary: Using Indico's Agentic AI architecture, a new application has been introduced that significantly speeds up the time it takes to generate quotes for top Global Insurance Carriers. This announcement was made by Indico Data, known as The Decision Automation Company™, on October 16, 2024. This launch represents the debut of the industry's initial Agentic AI-powered application, promising a substantial reduction in quoting time for leading insurance companies globally.

news.headline: Spire Inc. to hold fiscal 2024 earnings call on Nov. 20 to discuss Q4 results and earnings guidance.
news.summary: Spire Inc. (NYSE: SR) is set to hold a conference call and webcast on November 20, 2024, to review the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal year 2024. The discussion will also cover earnings guidance and other important topics. Prior to the market's opening, a news release will be shared detailing the key information. This event comes following the company's performance throughout the year and is expected to provide insights into its financial standing and future outlook.

news.headline: 2025 NAMM Show in Anaheim promises 5 days of events & education for retailers, brands, and attendees; Full schedule in November.
news.summary: Located in Anaheim, the January event showcased a sneak peek of the initial schedule for the opening two days, with the complete 5-day schedule set for release in November. The announcement was made on October 16, 2024, by NAMM (The National Association of Music Merchants), the top international non-profit music industry organization based in Carlsbad, California.

news.headline: TCL and T-Mobile launch first 5G RedCap device in exclusive T-Mobile stores, offering reliable connectivity without Wi-Fi.
news.summary: TCL has collaborated with Qualcomm and T-Mobile to create an ultra-portable device that offers secure connections without Wi-Fi. This innovative product, unveiled on October 16, 2024, in Irvine, California, signifies TCL's commitment to providing cutting-edge technology. TCL, known for its expertise in display technology, has partnered with industry giants Qualcomm and T-Mobile to ensure this device delivers reliable connectivity. This collaboration highlights the increasing importance of secure and reliable connections in today's fast-paced digital world.

news.headline: Actress Cho Boah promotes Visit Korean Heritage Campaign with a video on Changdeokgung Palace, released on October 14.
news.summary: Korean actress Cho Boah, the designated 2024 Korean Heritage Ambassador, recently showcased the splendor and historical importance of Changdeokgung Palace in a promotional video. The video was officially launched on October 14th across the various platforms of the Visit Korean Heritage Campaign, notably the "Korean Heritage Channel."Cho Boah's role as the 2024 Korean Heritage Ambassador helps to bring attention to the country's rich cultural history and heritage sites.

news.headline: F. William Studier wins 2024 Merkin Prize for technology producing millions of COVID-19 vaccine doses.CAMBRIDGE -Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: A highly innovative and adaptable technology is currently being utilized in laboratories worldwide for the efficient production of significant quantities of protein and RNA. In a notable event in CAMBRIDGE, Mass. on Oct. 16, 2024, the prestigious 2024 Richard N. Merkin Prize in Biomedical Technology was granted to F. William, recognizing his remarkable contributions in the field.

news.headline: Hyatt Place Sonoma Wine Country by Landmark Hotels, Inc. breaks ground, capturing wine country spirit.
news.summary: On October 9th, 2024, Landmark Hotels, Inc. held a blessing and groundbreaking event at the location of the new Hyatt Place Sonoma Wine Country franchise in St. Helena, California. The franchise integrates elements from the wine country into its brand design. This initiative aims to capture the essence of the region.

news.headline: Ladybug Nutratech sees rapid sales growth across all segments, surpassing $6.0 million USD revenue in H1 2024.
news.summary: Ladybug Resource Group, Inc., now known as Ladybug Nutratech, is a prominent player in the health and wellness products industry, based in Tulsa, Oklahoma. The company, trading as (OTC PINK: LBRG), has been experiencing sales growth across all business divisions. Following the recent update that they have exceeded $6.0 million USD in revenue during the first half of 2024, Ladybug's success highlights their consistent focus on innovation and market growth strategies.

news.headline: IonQ to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 6, 2024 after markets close; conference call at 4:30 PM. Phone: 877-407-4018 (domestic) or 201-689-8471 (international).
news.summary: IonQ, a prominent player in the quantum computing sector, will report its financial performance for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, on Wednesday, November 6, 2024, subsequent to the closure of financial markets. The company plans to conduct a conference call at 4:30 PM Eastern time on the same day to delve into its results and future prospects. Interested individuals can join the call via telephone at 877-407-4018 for domestic callers or 201-689-8471 for international participants.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer Tax & Accounting to host 2nd AI Tech Showcase for 1,400 professionals at CCH Connections: User Conference.
news.summary: Wolters Kluwer Tax & Accounting will be organizing its second AI Tech Showcase for 1,400 professionals in tax, accounting, and audit during the 20th CCH Connections User Conference. The event will highlight new AI-driven features for industry professionals.

news.headline: A10 Networks in San Jose introduces plan to secure & deliver AI apps, boosting cyber resilience.
news.summary: A technology company in San Jose, California, has released a plan to enhance security and performance for AI applications. A10 Networks aims to boost cyber resilience by outlining strategies to safeguard and optimize AI applications. This initiative underscores their focus on leveraging technology to address cyber threats effectively. This development demonstrates the company's commitment to staying ahead in the rapidly evolving digital landscape.

news.headline: Surescripts' new technology saves time in medication prior authorizations, per KLAS report.
news.summary: A report by Surescripts® highlights positive outcomes from a recent technology advancement that improved workflow efficiency and speed of approvals for prescription drug prior authorizations. The study, conducted in collaboration with three organizations, was featured in a KLAS K2 Collaborative Case Study. The innovative technology showcased a significant enhancement in streamlining medication prior authorizations, leading to quicker approvals. The report emphasized the successful results achieved through this initiative.

news.headline: Visa and Analytic Partners team up to boost commercial analytics for merchants with AI-driven solutions, aiming to enhance ROIs.
news.summary: Visa, a leading digital payments company listed on NYSE as V, has recently formed a strategic alliance with Analytic Partners, a worldwide analytics firm. This partnership aims to help merchants and brands solve commercial issues, such as optimizing advertising ROI, through advanced data analytics powered by artificial intelligence. The collaboration comes as businesses seek to make sense of vast amounts of data in today's fast-paced market.

news.headline: KdT Ventures in Austin, Texas has announced an oversubscribed Fund IV to invest in early-stage frontier science companies.
news.summary: Austin, Texas-based venture capital firm KdT Ventures has revealed that their Fund IV has been oversubscribed. The fund is dedicated to investing in early-stage frontier science companies. This latest fund aims to provide support and funding to innovative companies at their inception stage. The exact amount of the fund has not been disclosed, but it has surpassed the initial target due to high demand from investors. KdT Ventures specializes in backing companies that are pioneering advancements in various scientific fields and technology sectors.

news.headline: Mila and Ability Biologics collaborate to boost AI in antibody discovery; creating synergy from research to commercial stage.
news.summary: Ability Biologics has recently formed a significant partnership with Mila - Quebec Artificial Intelligence Institute in Montreal. The collaboration will combine Mila's vast network of AI and machine learning specialists with Ability's expertise in various areas such as immunology, antibody discovery, engineering, and therapeutic development. This partnership aims to drive innovation from research to the clinical and commercial phases. With Mila's renowned experts and researchers in AI and Ability's proficiency in immunology, antibody research, and therapeutic development, this union is poised to revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: BostonGene to discuss AI-driven cancer care at the 14th AVBCC Summit in NYC on Oct 16-18. Focus on value-based models.
news.summary: BostonGene, headquartered in Waltham, Massachusetts, is a prominent company offering AI-driven molecular and immune profiling solutions. They have disclosed their involvement in the upcoming 14th Annual Association for Value-Based Cancer Care (AVBCC) Summit and Educational Program, set to occur from October 16 to 18 in New York City. This event will gather oncology experts, insurers, and business figures to delve into the adoption of value-based frameworks that seek to improve the efficiency and affordability of cancer care.

news.headline: SoFi partners with Galileo for commercial payment services, adopting Cyberbank Core platform for enhancement in programs.
news.summary: SoFi is improving its business payment services by incorporating Galileo's Cyberbank Core platform, a cloud-based system.
